title: Golden Globes 2026: Awards Odds & Predictions
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards ceremony took place Sunday, January 11, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. ET on CBS and Paramount+. Comedian Nikki Glaser hosted the event from the Beverly Hilton. In the television drama actress category, Rhea Seehorn ("Pluribus") was positioned as the frontrunner with strong odds heading into the ceremony. The competing nominees included Britt Lower ("Severance"), Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Helen Mirren ("Mobland"), Bella Ramsey ("The Last of Us"), and Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"). The predictions showed this as a competitive field where traditional expectations could be upended, particularly when the voting body differs from the Emmys.
